name: Feature Registry
description: Maintains a persistent registry of codebase features with signatures, keywords, dependencies, and module membership using a database-backed storage system that reduces merge conflicts compared to the previous JSON-per-file approach. Provides feature lookup by task description or symbol name and builds context blocks for prompt injection.

Models/FeatureEntry.cs.content:
class FeatureEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  Keywords: List<string>
  PrimaryFiles: List<string>
  SecondaryFiles: List<string>

  DependsOn: List<string>

  ParentModuleId: string?

  TouchCount: int
  PlaceholderCreatedAt: DateTime?
  LastUpdatedAt: DateTime
  LastUpdatedByTaskId: string?

  Patterns: List<string>
  Dependencies: List<string>

  Hash: string
  Content: string
